markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 3
### Chapter 26. Aquatic Aircraft
##### § 26.002 — Application

This chapter applies to all navigable bodies of water of this state other than a navigable body of water that the federal government owns, controls, or has jurisdiction over.

*Added by Acts 1999, 76th Leg., ch. 820, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1999.*

subsections.text: This chapter applies to all navigable bodies of water of this state other than a navigable body of water that the federal government owns, controls, or has jurisdiction over.
